case_title: BIRCH GROVE PARTNERS, LLC VS. DANNY WASHINGTON et al

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-08-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DANNY WASHINGTON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
